description: Create a Bell state between two qubits and measure both.
Prepare a single qubit in uniform superposition and measure.
Generate a random classical bit using a qubit measurement.
Create a GHZ state across three qubits and return the results.
Show a simple quantum teleportation circuit.
Implement the Deutsch-Jozsa algorithm for a 2-qubit oracle.
